{
    "name": "Test profile from api",
    "group_id": null,

    "browser_type": 1, // 1 - chrome, 2 - firefox
    "browser_version": "137.0.7151.41", // existed version
    "os_type": 1, // 1 - Windows, 2 - MacOS Intel, 3 - MacOS ARM, 4 - Linux, 5 - Android
    "custom_user_agent": null, // null or custom user agent
    "task_bar_title": "abc",
    "webrtc_mode": null, // null = unset (follow default setting), 1 - Base on ip, 2 - Fixed, 3 - Real, 4 - Disable
    "fixed_webrtc_public_ip": "", // required for webrtc_mode = 2
    "geolocation_mode": null, // null = unset (follow default setting), 1 - Allow, 2 - Prompt, 3 - Block
    "canvas_mode": null, // null = unset (follow default setting), 1 - Noise, 2 - Real, 3 - Block
    "client_rect_mode": null, // null = unset (follow default setting), 1 - Noise, 2 - Real
    "webgl_image_mode": null, // null = unset (follow default setting), 1 - Noise, 2 - Real
    "webgl_metadata_mode": null, // null = unset (follow default setting), 1 - Masked, 2 - Real
    "audio_mode": null, // null = unset (follow default setting), 1 - Noise, 2 - Real
    "font_mode": null, // null = unset (follow default setting), 1 - Masked, 2 - Real
    "timezone_base_on_ip": true,
    "timezone": null, // set when timezone_base_on_ip = false
    "is_language_base_on_ip": true,
    "fixed_language": null // set when is_language_base_on_ip = false. Eg: vi, en, zh..
}
